title: Enigma Tech
description: All the mods that we use in the Enigma Tech Server!
body:
# Enigma Tech

This Modpack is a technical modpack, if you are new to TMC or an ancient relic of times, you can use this modpack as your 1-stop-shop for the best TMC mods to offer! 

This modpack features;
Chunky
Carpet, TIS and Extra
Sodium
Starlight
G4meSpeed
Pistorder
and so much more.

Enigma is introduced as a Technical and Decorative Minecraft server, focused on the pursuit of a rewarding experiencethrough fun and collaboration in project creation.
Our primary focus lies in building an environment whereparticipants can enjoy their gaming time while working on bothtechnical and decorative projects.

Put together by, Panex
